decision: ALLOW_AS_NOTE | ALLOW_WITH_POSTURE | REQUIRE_REVIEW | REQUIRE_TEST | REQUIRE_RECEIPT | HOLD | FAIL_CLOSED
allowed_next_state: What the artifact is allowed to become next.
claim_limit: Maximum public claim allowed from this artifact.
receipt_reference: Receipt, commit, hash, test result, or null.
required_follow_up: Follow-up required before stronger claim or next instruction.
